post_copy_actions: Update package.json repository to atomicstrata/atomicmemory with directory packages/sdk.
Update package.json homepage and bugs URLs to the monorepo issue tracker.
Strip references to atomicmemory-sdk repo paths in README.md, CHANGELOG.md, and ROADMAP.md (replace with monorepo paths).
Run npm pack --dry-run --json and reconcile the published file list against this allowlist.
Verify sideEffects entries and exports still resolve relative to packages/sdk after the move.
notes: SDK is a pure publishable library; benchmarks/ is kept because the public benchmarks justify performance claims in the root README per the docs contract. Reviewer should sanity-check that no fixtures embed sensitive prompts or transcripts.
